clinical_history: 31-year-old woman with ECG simulating ischemia.  What metabolic abnormality should you suspect?
diagnosis: Hypokalemia.  K+ here was 2.2mEq/L.  Very severe hypokalemia can cause ST depressions and T-wave inversions as seen here, mimicking ischemia.  But also note large U wave (positive deflection after ST-T and before P).
